items.definition_en: A short audio recording sent to someone online.
items.example_en: I left a voice message for her on the app.

items.definition_en: A private message sent directly to another user.
items.example_en: He sent me a direct message on Instagram.

items.definition_en: A video call that includes more than two people.
items.example_en: We had a group video call for our project.

items.definition_en: A list of people you are connected with online.
items.example_en: I checked my friend list to find his profile.

items.definition_en: A record of all messages exchanged in a chat.
items.example_en: I scrolled through our chat history to find the date.

items.definition_en: Information showing if a user is currently online.
items.example_en: Her online status says she is available.

items.definition_en: A sound that alerts you to a new message or event.
items.example_en: I changed my notification sound to something quieter.

items.definition_en: A sign that shows someone is writing a message.
items.example_en: I saw the typing indicator before she sent her reply.

items.definition_en: A small digital image used to express an emotion.
items.example_en: He sent a smiley emoji with his message.

items.definition_en: A message or update published on social media.
items.example_en: I shared a post about my vacation.

items.definition_en: A request to start chatting with someone you do not know.
items.example_en: I ignored the message request from a stranger.

items.definition_en: A sign that shows your message was read.
items.example_en: I saw the read receipt and knew he had seen my text.

items.definition_en: A series of connected replies in a chat or forum.
items.example_en: The reply thread made it easy to follow the conversation.

items.definition_en: The name shown to others in a digital space.
items.example_en: She changed her display name to something funnier.

items.definition_en: A visual area showing a single message in a chat.
items.example_en: The message bubble turned blue after I sent my text.

items.definition_en: A collection of saved personal or professional contacts.
items.example_en: Please check your contact list for my number.

items.definition_en: An alert that tells you a new message has arrived.
items.example_en: I get a message notification every time she texts me.

items.definition_en: A new post to let people know what you are doing.
items.example_en: He posted a status update about his new job.

items.definition_en: A message that has not been opened or read.
items.example_en: I found two unread messages in my inbox.

items.definition_en: A person who manages a chat group or forum.
items.example_en: Ask the admin if you have any questions about the rules.
